message:
test(engine): expand inline unit test coverage across 90+ modules

Add exhaustive test enrichment for Display impls (all enum variants),
serde round-trip serialization/deserialization, Ord/PartialOrd ordering
assertions, std::error::Error trait conformance checks, and default-value
assertions. Modules covered include adversarial_campaign, slot_registry,
session_hostcall_channel, frankentui_adapter, controller_interference_guard,
delegation_chain, epoch_invalidation, capability_witness, trust_zone,
checkpoint_frontier, fork_detection, reputation, and 80+ additional
engine modules spanning evidence, governance, policy, proof, and
execution subsystems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
